assertions.text: Table has at least one column name ending with '?' (e.g. 'Discount?' or 'Expected?')
assertions.evidence: Column header 'Discount?' appears in the table

assertions.text: Table has exactly 3 data rows (GOLD, SILVER, BRONZE)
assertions.evidence: Three data rows: 'Gold customer gets 20% | GOLD | 100 | 20', 'Silver customer gets 10% | SILVER | 100 | 10', 'Bronze customer gets no discount | BRONZE | 100 | 0'

assertions.text: Test method body contains only one assertEquals (or equivalent assertion) — not three
assertions.evidence: assertEquals(expected, discountService.calculate(tier, amount)); — single assertion in method body

assertions.text: Test method body contains no if or switch statements
assertions.evidence: Method body contains only: assertEquals(expected, discountService.calculate(tier, amount)); — no conditionals

assertions.text: Table has a scenario/description column as the leftmost column
assertions.evidence: Leftmost column is 'Scenario' with values like 'Gold customer gets 20%', 'Silver customer gets 10%', 'Bronze customer gets no discount'
